allow: Bash(python -c "from talents import views; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(views\); print\(len\(src.splitlines\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python manage.py shell -c "from rest_framework import status; print\(status.HTTP_200_OK\)")
Bash(python -c "import whitenoise; from whitenoise.middleware import WhiteNoiseMiddleware; print\('whitenoise OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import secrets, string; alphabet = string.ascii_letters + string.digits; print\(''.join\(secrets.choice\(alphabet\) for _ in range\(32\)\)\)")
Bash(python manage.py dumpdata --natural-foreign --natural-primary --indent 2 -e contenttypes -e auth.permission -e admin.logentry -e sessions -o pulsar_dump.json)

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('pulsar_dump.json'\)\); print\(f'Total objects: {len\(d\)}'\); from collections import Counter; c=Counter\(o['model'] for o in d\); [print\(f'  {m}: {n}'\) for m,n in c.most_common\(\)]")
